_README: 2026 IPL PLAYER PROJECTIONS — Complete auction pool. projected_value = Clay's final projection. predicted_value = model-predicted auction price. Pitchers have stats: IP, SV_H (saves+holds), QS, ERA, WHIP, K. Hitters have stats: AB, R, HR, RBI, SB, OPS. Rookies (is_rookie=true) get keeper premium bump.

players.notes: 🌱 Top prospect — #2 overall pick (2024). Minimal 2026 MLB time projected. Dynasty stash, not a production play.
